flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-San Diego rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.7k → $15.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-San Diego rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.5k → $51.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-San Diego rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.7k → $16.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-San Diego fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
